description: The controller needs a draft of the monthly income statement for management review.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the trial balance from the general ledger after all closing entries have been posted.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully retrieves the final trial balance for the month.

nodes.task_description: Map the general ledger accounts to the lines of the income statement (e.g., Revenue, COGS, SG&A).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly maps all P&L accounts.

nodes.task_description: Generate the income statement, showing current month actuals, budget, and variance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a formatted income statement with all required columns.
